name: pgAdmin
description: The most popular open-source administration and development platform for PostgreSQL — browse schemas, run queries, inspect query plans, manage users and export data from a powerful web UI.

aws.parity: pgAdmin connects to any PostgreSQL-compatible server — point it at a local container or an RDS/Aurora instance using the same UI and tooling.
aws.deploy: Add your RDS endpoint as a new server in pgAdmin (using the RDS hostname and port) and manage your production database with the same tooling.

variables.label: Web Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the pgAdmin web UI.

variables.label: Admin Email
variables.description: Email address used to log in to pgAdmin.

variables.label: Admin Password
variables.description: Password for the pgAdmin admin account.
